top_nav.style: Glassmorphism, backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0F]/80 border-b border-[#D4AF37]/20 z-50 sticky top-0

sidebar.style: bg-[#12121A] border-r border-[#D4AF37]/10 h-screen sticky top-0 overflow-y-auto
sidebar.item_style: text-sm text-slate-300 hover:text-[#3B82F6] hover:bg-[#3B82F6]/10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors

hero_search.input_style: bg-[#0A0A0F]/60 border border-[#D4AF37]/40 text-white rounded-none px-6 py-4 w-full max-w-2xl text-lg backdrop-blur-md focus:border-[#8B5CF6] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#8B5CF6]/50 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] placeholder:text-slate-500

category_cards.style: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#12121A] to-[#0A0A0F] border border-[#D4AF37]/30 p-8 cursor-pointer relative overflow-hidden group
category_cards.inner_glow: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-tr from-[#3B82F6]/0 to-[#8B5CF6]/0 group-hover:from-[#3B82F6]/10 group-hover:to-[#8B5CF6]/10 transition-colors duration-500

rpg_ui_frames.corner_accents: absolute w-3 h-3 border border-[#D4AF37] (top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right) to mimic game panels

video_card.style: group relative overflow-hidden border border-[#D4AF37]/20 bg-[#12121A]
video_card.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-black/40 group-hover:bg-black/20 transition-colors duration-300 flex items-center justify-center
video_card.play_button: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-[#E11D48]/80 text-white flex items-center justify-center backdrop-blur-md group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(225,29,72,0.6)]

effects_and_motion.particle_effects: Recommend using tsparticles for subtle glowing embers or floating magic dust in the hero section

hero_background.description: Cinematic dark fantasy landscape, gothic castle ruins in thick glowing purple/blue fog. Use in the main Hero / Search section.

featured_hero.description: Dark fantasy RPG character portrait, high level armored paladin. Use in the Featured Hero section.

weapon_icon.description: Glowing purple crystal broadsword icon. Use in the Items / Weapons category card or listings.

craft_orb.description: Mystical glowing orb of cosmos on stone pedestal. Use in Craft Systems or Orbs Stone category.

video_thumbnail_1.description: Dreamlike mountain landscape. Use as background for video tutorial cards.

video_thumbnail_2.description: Mysterious glass monolith in forest. Use as background for video tutorial cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building an immersive MMORPG Codex, not a standard SaaS platform. Avoid round, fluffy buttons. Use sharp edges, ornate borders, and stark high-contrast glows.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Cinzel' (google fonts) for a gothic, epic fantasy feel.
Do NOT use pure white backgrounds or standard light mode. Lock the theme to dark mode. The background should be '#0A0A0F'.
The Hero section must have a massive background image (use 'hero_background' URL) overlaid with a dark gradient (bg-black/60) so the search bar pops. Do not let the image overpower the UI.
Implement 'RPG UI Frames' for main containers. Instead of standard rounded cards, use rectangular divs with 1px gold/purple borders and corner adornments (small squares on corners).
For hover states on cards, use heavy box-shadows to simulate magical glows (e.g., shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(139,92,246,0.5)]).
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide icons for UI elements, but color them with gold or blue/purple accents to fit the theme.
Ensure the sidebar is collapsible, mimicking an in-game menu panel with dark translucent backgrounds.
For the Video Tutorials section, create a realistic YouTube embed overlay: use the provided thumbnail media URLs, put a dark overlay on them, and center a red/gold play button.
Admin panel should maintain the dark theme but prioritize functional density (Archetype 4 style embedded in dark mode) for data entry.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'data-testid="search-codex-input"').
